Chongqing, China

Day #

Arrivals
June 1, 2026

A dream come true.

First night in the mountain city

I made it to Chongqing today. This is a moment I have been looking forward to for a solid year. I am obsessed with cityies and lights and aeastice and vibes.

Now Roaming you are now roaming Travel / Experience / Enlightenment
